title: IndiaMart is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: IndiaMart is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? IndiaMart in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IndiaMart:
IndiaMart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndiaMart!
